title: Toro's Auto Message
description: Mod that allows players to automatically send messages every set period of time
body:
Toro's Auto Message

  • For Minecraft Fabric 1.18-1.20
  • Client-side mod
  • Works even when minecraft is minimized.
  • The messages are sent every period of time that you can change in the config.
  • Default toggle keybind is "H" but you can change it anytime at Options>Controls>Key Binds>Auto Message
  • Requires Fabric API 
  • Requires OwO Lib
  • Use /owo-config toros-auto-message to open the config screen. Alternatively you can install Mod Menu to easily configure this mod.

If you have any suggestions for future updates please write them in my discord server
